## Summary

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Environment

- OS: macOS version (example: macOS 15.5)
- Browser: name and version (example: Chrome 136)
- App version or commit: TODO (add if known)

1.

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened.

## Local file scanning permissions

- Did the browser ask for folder access permission?
- Which folder did you select (high-level only, do not post private paths)?
- Did the issue happen before or after granting permission?
- Does it reproduce with a different folder?

## Screenshots or recordings

Attach screenshots or a short recording if helpful.
Please redact personal file names and paths.

## Console errors or logs

Paste relevant logs/errors here.
Please remove personal data before sharing.

## Additional context

Anything else that might help diagnose the issue.
